title: Green Hydrogen Deals Signed by AndrexĂ‚Â® and KleenexĂ‚Â® Producer, Kimberly-Clark
content: The company announced that together with its energy partners, Carlton Power and HYRO (a joint venture between Octopus Energy Generation and RES), it is investing over Ă‚ÂŁ125 million into the emerging energy solution at its two plants in Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria and Northfleet, Kent. Combined, the two sites produce nearly one billion Andrex toilet rolls and over 150 million boxes of Kleenex tissues every year. Through the investment, Kimberly-Clark expects to see a 50% reduction versus its 2024 consumption of natural gas across its UK production lines from 2027.
author: Analysts Account
